# rasuvaeff/yii3-telemetry

Vendor-neutral tracing core for Yii3. Ergonomic `trace(name, callback)` facade
over a swappable OpenTelemetry-compatible backend. Namespace `Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry`.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-telemetry
```

Backend (real export, Sprint 2): `rasuvaeff/yii3-telemetry-otel`. Without it,
bind `TracerProviderInterface => NullTracerProvider` in the app.

## Rules

- Core depends on `open-telemetry/api` (thin). Types mirror OTel, no parallel
  model: `TraceKind->value == SpanKind::KIND_*`, `SpanStatusCode->value ==
  StatusCode::STATUS_*`, `TraceContext` = W3C fields.
- `config/di.php` binds ONLY the facade (`Tracer`, `TracerInterface`). NEVER bind
  `TracerProviderInterface` in core — one source owns it (backend or app), else
  `yiisoft/config` `Duplicate key`.
- `trace()` contract is frozen at 1.0.0 (roave/bc-check). Do not add methods to
  `SpanInterface`/`TracerInterface`.
- `currentSpan()` is never `null` — a dropped/disabled span returns a
  non-recording span.
- Two clocks, never mixed: `now()` (wall, PSR-20) vs `monotonicNanos()` (duration).
- PHP 8.3+, 64-bit only.

## API

### Tracer facade

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry\{Tracer, SpanInterface, TraceKind, SpanStatusCode};

$value = $tracer->trace(
    name: 'checkout.process',
    callback: static fn (SpanInterface $span): string => $span->setAttribute('k', 'v') ?? 'ok',
    attributes: ['user.id' => '7'],   // array<string, bool|int|float|string|array|null>
    scoped: true,                     // default true; span becomes currentSpan()
    traceKind: TraceKind::Internal,   // Internal|Client|Server|Producer|Consumer
);

$tracer->currentSpan();  // SpanInterface, never null
$tracer->getContext();   // TraceContext (invalid if none active)
```

trace() contract: returns callback value; on throw → recordException + status
Error + end + rethrow; nested trace inherits parent traceId; end() idempotent.

### SpanInterface

```php
$span->setAttribute(string $key, bool|int|float|string|array|null $value): void;
$span->updateName(string $name): void;
$span->setStatus(SpanStatusCode $code, ?string $description = null): void;
$span->recordException(\Throwable $e): void;
$span->end(): void;               // idempotent
$span->isRecording(): bool;       // false for NullSpan / after end
$span->getTraceContext(): TraceContext;
```

### Tracers / providers

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry\{NullTracer, NullTracerProvider, LogTracer};

new LogTracer($psrLogger);                 // dev: records real spans, logs each
NullTracer::instance();                    // no-op
new Tracer($tracerProvider);               // facade; provider->getTracer()
(new NullTracerProvider())->getTracer();   // => NullTracer
```

### TraceContext (W3C)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry\TraceContext;

$ctx = new TraceContext(
    traceId: '0af7651916cd43dd8448eb211c80319c', // 32 lowercase hex
    spanId: 'b7ad6b7169203331',                  // 16 lowercase hex
    traceFlags: 1,                               // 0..255, bit 0 = sampled
    traceState: '',                              // opaque tracestate
);
$ctx->isValid();   // false for all-zero (TraceContext::invalid())
$ctx->isSampled();
$ctx->equals($other);
```

Constructor throws `Exception\InvalidArgumentException` on malformed id/flags.

### Propagator

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry\TraceContextPropagator;

$p = new TraceContextPropagator();
$ctx = $p->extract($serverRequest);          // incoming ServerRequestInterface
$req = $p->inject($ctx, $clientRequest);     // outgoing RequestInterface (+traceparent)
```

### Clock

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Telemetry\{ClockInterface, SystemClock};

$clock = new SystemClock();      // implements Psr\Clock\ClockInterface + monotonicNanos()
$clock->now();                   // \DateTimeImmutable (wall)
$clock->monotonicNanos();        // int (hrtime, for durations)
```
